name: Glace' Baklava
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs until light.
2. Fold in the almonds and sugar.
3. Stir in the fruit.
4. Brush two sheets of phyllo pastry with melted butter, one at a time.
5. Place one sheet on top of the other and spread some fruit-and-nut mixture along the long edge in a band about 1 inch wide.
6. Fold in the ends and roll tightly like a jelly-roll.
7. Place the roll on a baking sheet and brush the top with melted butter.
8. Make diagonal slits along the entire length, about 1 1/2 inches apart, being careful not to cut all the way through.
9. Continue rolling until all nut mixture is used.
10. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F for about 1 1/2 hours or until golden brown.
11. Cut pieces from the entire roll.
12. Dip hot baklava pieces into cold syrup and drain well.
Syrup:
- Combine sugar, water, lemon juice, and cinnamon stick in a saucepan.
- Bring to a boil and simmer for 20 minutes. Cool.
